indicators.name: no stove or oven
indicators.rationale: No cooking appliances are visible, which are essential for cooking.

indicators.name: no sink
indicators.rationale: No water source is available for food preparation and cleaning.

indicators.name: no hard prep surfaces
indicators.rationale: No countertops or hard washable work surfaces are present for food preparation.

indicators.name: no storage for cooking utensils
indicators.rationale: No shelves or cabinets for storing cooking tools and ingredients.

indicators.name: no entertainment media
indicators.rationale: No TV or other entertainment devices are visible, indicating this is not a living room.

reasoning_summary: This indoor scene is completely unsuitable for daily cooking activities. There are no cooking appliances, no sink, no hard prep surfaces, no storage for cooking utensils, and no entertainment media, making it a living room rather than a kitchen.
